languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

languages.text: "Различие подмечено верно, но неверно истолковано. Очевидно, что сродство эльдаров к энергиям Эмпиреев выше, чем у Человечества, посему даже чудотворное поле Геллера не способно спасти их разум от... нежелательных последствий. Не пытайся объяснить свой видовой изъян чужой глупостью".

"The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

languages.text: «La distinción es correcta, pero se ha malinterpretado. Es evidente que la afinidad de los Aeldari por las energías del Empíreo es superior a la de la Humanidad, y, por tanto, ni siquiera el milagroso campo de Geller puede salvar sus mentes de... consecuencias indeseables. No acuse a otros de estupidez en un intento de explicar su defecto genético».
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: «La distinción es correcta, pero se ha malinterpretado. Es evidente que la afinidad de los Aeldari por las energías del Empíreo es superior a la de la Humanidad, y, por tanto, ni siquiera el milagroso campo de Geller puede salvar sus mentes de... consecuencias indeseables. No acuse a otros de estupidez en un intento de explicar su defecto genético».

languages.text: 「その区別は的確に観察されていますが、解釈を誤っています。アエルダリのエンピリアンのエネルギーへの親和性が人類のそれより高いことは明白であり、それゆえ、奇跡のゲラーフィールドをもってしても、彼らの精神を……望ましからぬ結果から救うことはできません。自らの遺伝的欠陥を取り繕おうとして、他者を愚かと責めるのはおやめなさい」
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: 「その区別は的確に観察されていますが、解釈を誤っています。アエルダリのエンピリアンのエネルギーへの親和性が人類のそれより高いことは明白であり、それゆえ、奇跡のゲラーフィールドをもってしても、彼らの精神を……望ましからぬ結果から救うことはできません。自らの遺伝的欠陥を取り繕おうとして、他者を愚かと責めるのはおやめなさい」

languages.text: “你的观察很敏锐，但解读有误。艾达灵族与至高天能量联系之深，显然远胜人类。因此即便是盖勒力场这样的奇迹，也无法保护他们的心智免受……某些后果之苦。不要为了解释你们的基因缺陷，而指责别人愚蠢。”
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: “你的观察很敏锐，但解读有误。艾达灵族与至高天能量联系之深，显然远胜人类。因此即便是盖勒力场这样的奇迹，也无法保护他们的心智免受……某些后果之苦。不要为了解释你们的基因缺陷，而指责别人愚蠢。”

languages.text: "Ihr habt den Unterschied gut beobachtet, aber falsch interpretiert. Es ist offensichtlich, dass die Aeldari eine stärkere Affinität zu den Energien des Empyreum haben als die Menschheit. Demzufolge ist selbst das wundersame Gellerfeld nicht in der Lage, ihren Verstand vor ... unerwünschten Konsequenzen zu schützen. Bezichtigt andere nicht der Dummheit, um Euren genetischen Defekt wegzureden."
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt den Unterschied gut beobachtet, aber falsch interpretiert. Es ist offensichtlich, dass die Aeldari eine stärkere Affinität zu den Energien des Empyreum haben als die Menschheit. Demzufolge ist selbst das wundersame Gellerfeld nicht in der Lage, ihren Verstand vor ... unerwünschten Konsequenzen zu schützen. Bezichtigt andere nicht der Dummheit, um Euren genetischen Defekt wegzureden."

languages.text: « Cette distinction est bien observée, mais elle est le fruit d'une interprétation erronée. Il est évident que l'affinité des Aeldaris pour les énergies empyréennes est plus forte que celle des humains, et c'est pourquoi même des miracles comme le champ de Geller sont incapables d'épargner à leurs esprits des conséquences fort... indésirables. N'accusez pas autrui de stupidité dans une tentative pour minimiser une défaillance génétique. »
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: « Cette distinction est bien observée, mais elle est le fruit d'une interprétation erronée. Il est évident que l'affinité des Aeldaris pour les énergies empyréennes est plus forte que celle des humains, et c'est pourquoi même des miracles comme le champ de Geller sont incapables d'épargner à leurs esprits des conséquences fort... indésirables. N'accusez pas autrui de stupidité dans une tentative pour minimiser une défaillance génétique. »

languages.text: "Ayrım iyi gözlemlenmiş ancak yanlış yorumlanmış. Aeldarilerin Gök Diyar enerjilerine olan yatkınlığının İnsanlığınkinden daha yüksek olduğu açık. Bu nedenle mucizevi Geller alanı bile zihinlerini... İstenmeyen sonuçlardan kurtaramıyor. Kendi genetik kusurunuzu haklı çıkarmaya çalışırken başkalarını aptallıkla suçlamayın."
languages.original_text: "The distinction is well observed, but misinterpreted. It is evident that the Aeldari's affinity for Empyrean energies is higher than that of Humanity, and as such even the miraculous Geller field is unable to save their minds from... undesirable consequences. Do not accuse others of stupidity in an attempt to explain away your genetic defect."

traits.locale_text: "Ayrım iyi gözlemlenmiş ancak yanlış yorumlanmış. Aeldarilerin Gök Diyar enerjilerine olan yatkınlığının İnsanlığınkinden daha yüksek olduğu açık. Bu nedenle mucizevi Geller alanı bile zihinlerini... İstenmeyen sonuçlardan kurtaramıyor. Kendi genetik kusurunuzu haklı çıkarmaya çalışırken başkalarını aptallıkla suçlamayın."
